estimators.name: Ron Schledwitz
estimators.title: Project Manager / GSC / Estimator / Safety Coordinator
personalization_hooks: Wears multiple hats (PM + Estimator + GSC + Safety) — he is the bid-list owner at Regent.
GSC = Gold Seal Certified, a credibility cue Ahmad can match when pitching Ashrah's training / safety angle.
Regent has been doing commercial/industrial GC since 1987 (25+ years) — Ron has likely seen many painting subs come and go; the 'protect your reputation' pitch lands well.
Small-team firm at 919 Dugald Rd — Ron is reachable; Ahmad should call (204) 231-3456 and ask for Ron directly.
